description: Recto: copy of a letter from Sharira Gaon to Fustat, around 970. The writer asks to renew the community’s support for the Yeshiva. The letter was written soon after Sharira became the Gaon. Verso: an answer for a question about the rules when traveling in a ship during Passover and Shabbat. (Information from Gil, Kingdom. Vol. 2, #24) VMR
description_he: העתק מכתב משרירא גאון לפוסטאט, כ-970, על חידוש תמיכת הקהילה בישיבה; בגב: תשובה על נסיעה בספינה בפסח ובשבת
